method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: I find myself deeply immersed in the interplay between memory and absence. Each layer I add or subtract serves to evoke a sense of navigable space, creating a dialogue between what is present and what is missing. The challenge lies in maintaining emotional depth while avoiding over-literal interpretations.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The concept of memory palaces has greatly influenced my approach, emphasizing how spaces can be filled with both presence and void. The idea of 'ma' or negative space further guides my composition, allowing absence to speak volumes.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Ghost Archives" step 2/4. Visual anchor directive: foreground thresholds with large negative fields. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: memory as navigable space; counterpoint with absence as active force. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-literal symbolism. Technique emphasis: layered depth + aggressive subtraction; avoid drifting into Color Contradiction Studies. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Ghost Archives step 2/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
